photo_observations.facade_colour_observed: warm red-brown brick upper storey, dark-painted ground floor storefront with black metal framing
photo_observations.facade_condition_notes: Upper brick in fair condition with some weathering; storefront glazing intact; signage well-maintained
photo_observations.window_details: Two narrow double-hung sash windows on second floor, dark frames, flanking the gable peak area
photo_observations.door_details: Glass storefront entry door, right side of ground floor, dark metal frame
photo_observations.cornice_details: Simple brick cornice at roofline, no elaborate moulding visible
photo_observations.decorative_details: Large yellow-on-green painted signage reading 'URBAN CATWALK WHOLESALE & RETAIL' across storefront fascia; secondary A-frame sidewalk sign
photo_observations.storefront_description: A full-width Urban Catwalk storefront fills the ground floor with large display glazing, dark metal framing, visible merchandise, and a security grille layered over the shopfront after hours.
photo_observations.signage_observed: URBAN CATWALK - yellow lettering on green background, mounted on fascia above storefront; secondary ground-level A-frame sign with same branding
photo_observations.alterations_visible: Ground floor fully converted to commercial storefront; original residential fenestration likely removed at ground level; security grille added
photo_observations.notes: Night photo. Narrow 2-storey commercial on Kensington Ave pedestrian strip. Typical converted Victorian house-form with ground-floor retail. Adjacent to similar row of converted houses. Party wall visible on right side (shared with neighbour).

notes: Narrow 2-storey commercial on Kensington Ave pedestrian strip. Typical converted Victorian house-form with full ground-floor retail storefront. Night photo, party walls both sides.

storefront.description: A full-width Urban Catwalk storefront spans the grade level with large display glazing, dark metal framing, visible merchandise, and a bold yellow-on-green fascia sign above.

facade_detail.composition: The street frontage spans roughly 5.2 metres across 2 storeys beneath a gable, consistent with its commercial typology.
facade_detail.opening_rhythm: The facade is organized as a storefront base with 2 upper-window bays, using double hung, and 1 principal entrance.

facade_description: 10 Kensington Ave (Urban Catwalk) presents a commercial street frontage within the Kensington Market HCD. The street frontage spans roughly 5.2 metres across 2 storeys beneath a gable, consistent with its commercial typology. The frontage is defined primarily by mixed in a warm red-brown brick upper, dark-painted storefront ground floor palette, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade is organized as a storefront base with 2 upper-window bays, using double hung, and 1 principal entrance.
